rationale: The citing paper focuses on private-label umbrella rebranding effects in field quasi-experiments (brand strength and price/promotion/assortment elasticities), whereas the cited paper examines copycat similarity and comparative evaluation in experiments, so topical overlap exists but is indirect. The only linkage provided is a DOI-level reference match (no in-text citation context or quoted sentence), which is insufficient to tell whether this is substantive theory/mechanism use or just background branding literature. Given this sparse evidence, it cannot be safely dropped.
